summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Invoice Number Format, GST Round-Off, Credit Pricing, 48-Hour Cancellation Policy, and Meeting Room Label features. All 7 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to test setup). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Invoice number format YYYY-YYYY/MM/SEQ/CLIENT for April-December (FY = CurrentYear-NextYear)
Backend: Invoice number format YYYY-YYYY/MM/SEQ/CLIENT for January-March (FY = PrevYear-CurrentYear)
Backend: Grand total is always whole rupee (GST-compliant rounding)
Backend: 48-hour cancellation - credits restored when >48 hours before booking
Backend: 48-hour cancellation - credits forfeited when <48 hours before booking
Frontend: 'Excess Credits' label appears when Meeting Room Charges is selected
Frontend: 'Quantity (Seats)' label appears for other service types
Frontend: Round-Off Adjustment field visible in invoice preview
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice number format correctly implemented with FY derived from invoice_date (not current date)
GST-compliant rounding correctly rounds grand_total to nearest whole rupee
Credit pricing correctly configured: CR-1 = 20 credits/hour, MR-1/MR-2 = 5 credits/30-min
48-hour cancellation policy correctly implemented in member_portal.py cancel_member_booking()
Dynamic label switching for 'Excess Credits' vs 'Quantity (Seats)' working in CreateInvoice.jsx
seed_data_creation: Used existing company 'To Be Honest Circle LLP' and 'Apex Legal Eagles' for testing. Test invoices created and cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Invoice number format YYYY-YYYY/MM/SEQ/CLIENT with FY derived from invoice_date, 2) 'Excess Credits' label for Meeting Room Charges, 3) GST round-off adjustment field with whole rupee grand_total, 4) Credit pricing: CR=20 credits/hour, MR=5 credits/30-min, 5) 48-hour cancellation policy for credit restoration. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_invoice_format_and_rules.py

gst_round_off.round_off_adjustment_field: Present in Invoice model and API response
gst_round_off.grand_total: Always rounded to nearest whole rupee
